items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the quiet hours compliance, specifically ensuring that no text messages are sent at 3 AM. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation of this requirement. Without concrete evidence demonstrating compliance or a gap in this area, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
